title: Pondicherry、Puducherry — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Pondicherry、Puducherry的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Pondicherry是Puducherry的一个城市，人口约250,000。A former French colony on the Coromandel Coast, known for its French Quarter, serene beaches, and Sri Aurobindo Ashram.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
